task:
/home/user/Documents/product_overview.odp is open in LibreOffice Impress. The 4-slide deck contains: Slide 1 — title 'Orbit CRM', subtitle 'Learn more'; Slide 2 — 'Features' with 3 bullets; Slide 3 — 'Pricing' with 3 bullets; Slide 4 — 'Contact' with 3 lines.

Make the following changes:

1. On Slides 2, 3, and 4, add an entrance (Entry) animation to the body/bullet-list placeholder so that the bullets animate in when the slide is presented. Any entrance effect is acceptable (Appear, Fly In, Fade In, etc.).
2. On Slide 1, turn the text 'Learn more' inside the subtitle into a hyperlink pointing to https://www.libreoffice.org.

Save the file, overwriting /home/user/Documents/product_overview.odp and keeping the .odp format. The deck must still have exactly 4 slides.

verification.description: Slide 2 has at least one animation element
Slide 3 has at least one animation element
Slide 4 has at least one animation element
Slide 1 has a hyperlink on text 'Learn more' to libreoffice.org
